mapper.select: SELECT D.disease_name AS disease, COUNT(PD.patient_id) AS count, COUNT(PD.patient_id) AS percentage FROM `diseases` D JOIN `patient_diseases` PD ON D.disease_id = PD.disease_id GROUP BY D.disease_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT MIN(age) AS min_age, MAX(age) AS max_age FROM `patients`;

SELECT CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 0 AND 10 THEN '0-10' WHEN age BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20' WHEN age BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30' WHEN age BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40' WHEN age BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN '41-50' WHEN age BETWEEN 51 AND 60 THEN '51-60' ELSE '60+' END AS age_group, gender, COUNT(*) as count FROM patients WHERE gender IS NOT NULL GROUP BY age_group, gender;
SELECT country as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM patients WHERE country IS NOT NULL AND country != '' GROUP BY country ORDER BY value DESC;
